title: Postgres SSOT Backup Architecture
description: Design and implement a multi-layered backup and replication system for the SSOT.
reason: Critical for long-term durability but not required during early organism development.

proposed_architecture.offsite: Nightly encrypted pg_dump to Backblaze B2
proposed_architecture.snapshot: Weekly snapshot to Google Drive or OneDrive
proposed_architecture.replication: Optional streaming replica to $5 cloud VM
proposed_architecture.archival: Optional encrypted weekly dumps to IPFS/Filecoin
